title: christella subelata
intro: Christella subelata, also known as the Chinese basket fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Christella subelata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various gastrointestinal disorders. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or decoction, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make a paste or tincture for topical application.
